title: STAT+: Justice Department backs AbbVie in its bid to overturn a Colorado law guiding a drug discount program
description: DOJ is backing AbbVie in its battle to overturn a Colorado law that prohibits pharmaceutical companies from placing restrictions on the 340B drug discount program.
content: DOJ is backing AbbVie in its battle to overturn a Colorado law that prohibits pharmaceutical companies from placing restrictions on the 340B drug discount program.
